reason: Synced the chat-workbench design spec with source_metadata_json alignment, the environment-contract fallback/order and field semantics, export fail-closed gating for missing environment contracts, and the planning-only lifecycle-chain boundary; also added a discoverability note in the skills index.
Documented chat workbench export summary persistence, Skill Tests deep-link query contract, and source tag rendering for chat-exported draft cases.
Updated the test contract notes to reflect the newly added source_metadata_json persistence coverage and the rule that environment/chain metadata stays out of free-text notes.

Updated the skill-testing spec with the chain runner continuation policy split: strict stop_on_failure remains default, while goal-threshold continuation records continued step audit without rewriting run verdicts.
Documented the OpenSandbox pre-baked image contract: Python package bootstrap requires images with python/python3, pip, and python3-venv; plain node:20-bookworm is only a Node-only fallback.
Documented environmentConfig.asset, asset-check status/phase, dynamic-trigger environment decoupling, and env_not_built/env_stale run semantics.

Documented shared skill/profile environment assets, the new environment-assets read endpoints, environment-build registration semantics, and execution-side inheritance by envProfile with case-level asset override/pin remaining explicit.

Documented run-evaluation.ts as the owner of full-mode AI judge prompts/runs, sequence evidence scoring, tool-call matching, and verdict aggregation, keeping skill-test-controller as wiring/persistence only.

summary: Documented testing-doc-draft module ownership, environment-build duplicate warning semantics, and structured invalid-heading validation for TESTING.md draft preview/apply.
Documented the chat-workbench default of full+execution planning, the includeInExport import alias, and the export-scope wording for matrix rows so prompt/skill/runtime behavior stay aligned.
Updated the TESTING.md draft workflow contract so missing files auto-create guarded preview drafts while existing-file refresh stays explicit, and added the required auto-preview regression coverage.
Documented same-conversation repeated-export dedupe semantics for chat-workbench draft export and added the required e2e regression note.
Documented the delete-case contract that dependent skill_test_runs and skill_test_chain_run_steps rows are removed transactionally before deleting the case row.
Documented the chain-run observability rule that running steps must expose a live-trace jump action before persisted run-detail/session-export rows exist.
Documented that the Skill Tests runs tab should self-refresh from live events with a short polling fallback while the selected case still has in-flight activity.
